rejection_reason: compliance: email_require_legal_footer — break-up email is missing required CAN-SPAM footer. Even final outreach emails are commercial communications and must include a physical address and unsubscribe mechanism.
text:
Subject: Closing the loop, {{first_name}}

Hey {{first_name}},

I've reached out a couple of times and haven't heard back, so I'll assume the timing isn't right.

If {{company}}'s team ever needs to reduce onboarding time or improve pipeline consistency, feel free to reach back out.

Wishing you a strong Q4.
